message:
perf: optimize bandwidth with centralized config

- Add config.zig as single source of truth for all settings
- Adaptive JPEG quality based on pixel count (20-60)
- Lower max pixels to 600K for faster rendering
- Increase Kitty chunk size to 64KB
- 24fps screencast and mouse tick rate

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.8.4",
+  "version": "0.8.5",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
   "bin": {
